creator: bmah@ca.sandia.gov
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	dxpc-3.7.0
#	dxpc-3.7.0/pkg
#	dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/COMMENT
#	dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/DESCR
#	dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/PLIST
#	dxpc-3.7.0/Makefile
#	dxpc-3.7.0/files
#	dxpc-3.7.0/files/md5
#
echo c - dxpc-3.7.0
mkdir -p dxpc-3.7.0 > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - dxpc-3.7.0/pkg
mkdir -p dxpc-3.7.0/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/COMMENT'
XCompressing X protocol proxy designed to support X11 over slow links.
END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/DESCR'
Xdxpc is an X protocol compressor designed to improve the speed of X11
Xapplications run over low-bandwidth links (such as dialup PPP
Xconnections).  dxpc attempts to exploit patterns in X protocol
Xmessages to limit the amount of data actually sent over the network.
X
XThe homepage for dxpc is:
X
Xhttp://ccwf.cc.utexas.edu/~zvonler/dxpc/
X
XBruce A. Mah
Xbmah@ca.sandia.gov
END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/DESCR
echo x - dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/PLIST'
Xbin/dxpc
Xman/man1/dxpc.1.gz
END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/pkg/PLIST
echo x - dxpc-3.7.0/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >dxpc-3.7.0/Makefile << 'END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	dxpc
X# Version required:     3.7.0
X# Date created:		2 May 1998
X# Whom:			Bruce A. Mah <bmah@ca.sandia.gov>
X#
X# $Id$
X#
X
XDISTNAME=       dxpc-3.7.0
XCATEGORIES=	x11
XMASTER_SITES=   ${MASTER_SITE_XCONTRIB}
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	utilities
X
XMAINTAINER=	bmah@ca.sandia.gov
X
XMAN1=		dxpc.1
X
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XUSE_X11=	yes
X
Xpost-install:
X	strip ${PREFIX}/bin/dxpc
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/Makefile
echo c - dxpc-3.7.0/files
mkdir -p dxpc-3.7.0/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - dxpc-3.7.0/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >dxpc-3.7.0/files/md5 << 'END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/files/md5'
XMD5 (dxpc-3.7.0.tar.gz) = 9b9b6605e46bf1731d44e150049a019e
END-of-dxpc-3.7.0/files/md5
exit
